nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: Rhipidura
nodes.summary: Rhipidura（Rhipidura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联59种鸟类，如Black fantail、Black-and-cinnamon fantail、Mindanao blue fantail等59种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-tailed fantail
nodes.summary: The rufous-tailed fantail (Rhipidura phoenicura) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae. It is endemic to Java in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The rufous-tailed fantail (Rhipidura phoenicura) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae. It is endemic to Java in Indonesia.
